body_txt: As humans, we have evolved to the point where what was once normal, i.e. using the bathroom in a place other than... well, the bathroom, is considered abnormal behavior. However, that doesn't necessarily mean that it doesn't happen. In this trope, a character, rather than defecating in a toilet, does so in a place other than a toilet, or mentions a time that they defecated in a place other than a toilet. An example of Toilet Humor and Vulgar Humor . May come as a result of a Potty Emergency , or a place being Mistaken for Toilet . If the character defecates in their pants, the trope becomes Potty Failure . If they defecate in the pool, it crosses into Putting the Pee in Pool . Compare Intentional Mess Making . May be a supertrope of Excrement Statement . In some instances the character may Go to the Euphemism . Compare with Urine Trouble where a character does this but with releasing urine instead. If the character poops in nature, then it crosses into Nature Tinkling . If it's a non-anthropomorphic animal that does this, they're letting out Road Apples . If the feces are weaponized, see Dung Fu . Burning Bag of Poop is a subtrope if the feces in question belongs to a human or non-anthropomorphic animal. People who do this are sometimes referred to as "Phantom Shitters". Do Not Try This at Home (or really, any public area) : Human faeces are considered to be a biological health hazard, not to mention the sight and/or smell can provoke nausea or even vomiting in other people. There are also laws against doing this in many locales — jail time is possible and you could even end up on a sex offenders register for indecent exposure. Please do not add any video examples to this trope.
